user_query: I am planning a trip to Seoul, South Korea with my family and we would like to explore the popular Korean baby names for both boys and girls. Can you provide us with the most popular Korean baby girl names and Korean baby boy names in Korea? Additionally, we would like to gather information about the calendar exceptions for our trip using Aspose.Tasks Cloud API.

TaskList.description: Gather the most popular Korean baby girl names.
Gather the most popular Korean baby boy names.
Use Aspose.Tasks Cloud API to gather calendar exception information for the trip.
